[RELEASE] New Version of Anything2Real LoRA - Transform Any Art Style to Photorealistic Images Based On Flux2 Klein
f2k_anything2real.safetensors is more 3D like version
f2k_anything2real_a.safetensors based on f2k_anything2real.safetensors to adjust the realistic style
[RELEASE] New Version of Anything2Real LoRA - Transform Any Art Style to Photorealistic Images Based On Qwen Edit 2511
Hey Stable Diffusion community! 👋
I'm excited to share the new version of Anything2Real family, Anything2Real 2601 A.
Anything2Real 2601 A is an adjusted version based on Anything2Real 2601 and remixed the layer weight of anything2real alpha.
Anything2Real 2601 is kinda weak of eyes transformation and anything2real alpha is quite good at light and shadow but weak at color.
Anything2Real 2601 A is a more balanced version between "respect to original" and "realistic environemnt"
Alpha Dataset
:
lrzjason/Anything2Real_demo_dataset
🔗 Civitai:
https://civitai.com/models/2121900/qwen-edit-2511-anything2real-2601
🎯 What It Does
This LoRA is designed to convert illustrations, anime, cartoons, paintings, and other non-photorealistic images into convincing photographs while preserving the original composition and content.
⚙️ How to Use
Base Model:
Qwen Edit 2511 (mmdit editing model)
Recommended Strength:
1-0.75
Prompt Template:
change the picture 1 to realistic photograph, [description of your image]
Adding detailed descriptions helps the model better understand content and produces superior transformations (though it works even without detailed prompts!)
📺 Example Workflow
Check out this practical implementation example on RunningHub:
https://www.runninghub.ai/post/1988649905554112513/?inviteCode=rh-v1279
Node Information:
21 nodes including CLIPLoader, ConditioningZeroOut, ImageScaleBy, KSampler, LoadImage, LoraLoaderModelOnly, and specialized Qwen Edit nodes
Powered by RTX 4090 Series
📌 Important Notes
“realism” is inherently subjective, first modulate strength or switch base models rather than further increasing the LoRA weight.
Should realism remain insufficient, blend with an additional photorealistic LoRA and adjust to taste.
Your feedback and examples would be incredibly valuable for future improvements!
💡 Why I Created This
I wanted to bridge the gap between artistic creations and photorealistic results without having to start from scratch. Whether you're an artist wanting to see your characters in realistic form, or just curious about transforming your favorite art styles into photographs, this tool is for you!
I'd love to see what you create with Anything2Real! Please share your results and suggestions in the comments. Every test case helps improve the next version.
Note: For best results, follow the workflow demonstrated in the RunningHub example. Feel free to reach out with questions or collaboration ideas!
